title: File mention picker component with fuzzy search and keyboard navigation
purpose: Provides a dropdown picker for selecting files to mention in chat, with fuzzy filtering and keyboard navigation support.
module_context: Exports a React component FileMentionPicker that handles file selection and displays a list of matching files based on user input. Includes debounced API fetching when no files prop is provided.

steps.content: Return all items if query is empty.
Convert query to lowercase for case-insensitive matching.
Filter items to include only those containing the query string.
Initialize state for fetched files and active selection index.
Set up debounced API call to fetch files when no files prop is provided.
Apply fuzzy filtering to either provided files or fetched files based on query.
Reset active index when results change.
Handle keyboard navigation for arrow keys and enter/escape.
Render empty state or file list based on results availability.
Set up debounced fetch when no files prop is provided.
Clear previous timeout before setting new one.
Make API request to fetch files matching the query.
Process API response to extract file paths.
Handle API errors by setting empty file list.
Clean up timeout on component unmount.
Apply fuzzy filter to provided files if available.
Apply fuzzy filter to fetched files if no files prop provided.
Set up keyboard event listener for navigation and selection.
Handle down arrow key to move selection down.
Handle up arrow key to move selection up.
Handle enter key to select active item.
Handle escape key to dismiss picker.
Clean up keyboard event listener on component unmount.
